query: Review PR #3284 and produce a verdict plus a draft RFR.
expected_behavior: Runs same-fix-already-merged check (skip if a sibling PR with high title-overlap merged in the last 14 days).
Applies the two-lens judgment chain (Scope/Coverage + Sequencing) then the Karpathy review lens; fails fast.
Resolves reviewers from .github/CODEOWNERS intersected with the PR's changed files; checks reviewer-load via gh search prs --review-requested for each candidate team.
For APPROVE verdicts: produces a draft PR comment (<=30 lines) plus a 2-line draft RFR with auto-resolved team handles.
